channel.title: Compressive Sensing on In Digits
channel.description: Recent content in Compressive Sensing on In Digits

item.author: shailesh@indigits.com (Shailesh Kumar)
item.description: Research I am pursuing my Ph.D. from Indian Institute of Technology, Delhi, India in Bharti School of Telecommunications. My research focus is on sparse representations and compressed sensing. Publications Kumar, S., (2021). CR-Sparse: Hardware accelerated functional algorithms for sparse signal processing in Python using JAX. Journal of Open Source Software, 6(68), 3917, https://doi.org/10.21105/joss.03917 Notes During the course of study, I have prepared some notes which have helped me understand the field better.
